mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rest_logs (`쉼표번호`, rest_type_id, place_id, start_time, end_time, memo, emotion_before, emotion_after, mood_tags_json, deleted) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{restTypeId}, #{placeId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{memo}, #{emotionBefore}, #{emotionAfter}, #{moodTagsJson}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, rest_type_id, place_id, start_time, end_time, memo, emotion_before, emotion_after, mood_tags_json, deleted, created_at FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, rest_type_id, place_id, start_time, end_time, memo, emotion_before, emotion_after, mood_tags_json, deleted, created_at FROM rest_logs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE rest_logs SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, type_name, description, icon, color_code FROM rest_types ORDER BY id
SELECT id, rest_type_id, activity_name, guide_content, duration_minutes FROM rest_activities WHERE rest_type_id = #{restTypeId} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, emotion_after AS score, mood_tags_json AS moodTagsJson, memo, created_at AS recordedAt FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND emotion_after IS NOT NULL AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT ra.id, ra.activity_name AS title, rt.type_name AS category, ra.duration_minutes AS duration, ra.guide_content AS guideContent FROM rest_activities ra JOIN rest_types rt ON ra.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE ra.id = #{id}
